title: RAD-TUI v2.2.0 Development Plan
instructions: Create RAD-TUI version 2.2.0 with advanced controls, database connectivity, data visualization, and enhanced UI components. Build upon v2.1.0's modular architecture to add TreeView, TabControl, ProgressBar, Slider, Toolbar, StatusBar controls. Implement SQLite database integration with query capabilities. Add Chart/Graph control for data visualization. Create Network module for HTTP operations. Implement ColorPicker and Custom Dialog systems. Update documentation and create example projects demonstrating all new features.

1783697572.2347982.instruction: Create docs/ROADMAP_V22.md documenting all planned v2.2.0 features including: 1) New controls list (TreeView, TabControl, ProgressBar, Slider, Toolbar, StatusBar, Splitter, ColorPicker, Chart), 2) Database integration architecture (SQLite module), 3) Network module design (HTTP operations), 4) Custom Dialog system design, 5) Module dependencies and integration points with existing v2.1.0 modules.

1783697575.1952415.instruction: Create src/treeview.py implementing TreeView control with: TreeNode class (text, icon, expanded flag, children list), TreeView class (root nodes, selected_node, add_node(), remove_node(), expand_node(), collapse_node(), get_selected(), render method with indentation and expand/collapse icons [+]/[-], handle click events for node selection and expand/collapse). Include events: on_node_click, on_node_expand, on_node_collapse, on_node_select.

1783697578.2327673.instruction: Create src/tabcontrol.py implementing TabControl with: TabPage class (caption, controls list, visible flag), TabControl class (tabs list, active_tab_index, add_tab(), remove_tab(), set_active_tab(), get_active_tab(), render method showing tab headers and active tab content, handle click events on tab headers). Include events: on_tab_change, on_tab_click. Support vertical or horizontal tab orientation.

1783697583.4327722.instruction: Create src/progressbar.py implementing ProgressBar control with: min_value, max_value, current_value properties, orientation (horizontal/vertical), show_percentage flag, bar character (e.g., █ or =), fill character for background. Include methods: set_value(), get_value(), set_range(), increment(). Render method showing filled portion and percentage if enabled. Include events: on_value_change, on_complete (when value reaches max).

1783697586.2535145.instruction: Create src/slider.py implementing Slider control with: min_value, max_value, current_value, step_increment properties, orientation (horizontal/vertical), show_ticks flag, tick_frequency. Include methods: set_value(), get_value(), set_range(), increment(), decrement(). Render method showing track and thumb position. Include events: on_value_change, on_track (while dragging), on_change_complete (when released).

1783697589.3249211.instruction: Create src/toolbar.py implementing Toolbar control with: ToolbarButton class (caption, icon, tooltip, enabled, checked flags), Toolbar class (buttons list, orientation horizontal/vertical, button_size). Include methods: add_button(), remove_button(), enable_button(), disable_button(), set_checked(). Render method showing buttons with icons and tooltips. Include events: on_button_click, on_button_check (for toggle buttons). Support separator buttons.

1783697592.1548092.instruction: Create src/statusbar.py implementing StatusBar control with: StatusPanel class (text, width, alignment, auto_size flag), StatusBar class (panels list, simple_mode flag). Include methods: add_panel(), remove_panel(), set_panel_text(), get_panel_text(), set_simple_text(). Render method showing panels at bottom of form. Support automatic panel sizing (spring panels that fill remaining space).

1783697651.640651.instruction: Create src/splitter.py implementing Splitter control for resizable panels with: orientation (horizontal/vertical), min_size for panels, position property (0.0-1.0 or pixel position). Include methods: set_position(), get_position(), set_min_size(). Render method showing splitter bar with handle. Include events: on_splitter_moving (during drag), on_splitter_moved (after release). Support for docking panels on either side of splitter.

1783697671.1348076.instruction: Create src/colorpicker.py implementing ColorPicker control with: Color class (r, g, b values, hex string conversion), color_palette list of preset colors, custom_color support. Include methods: set_color(), get_color(), show_color_dialog() (modal dialog with color selection). Render method showing current color swatch. Include events: on_color_change, on_color_select. Support both palette selection and RGB value input.

1783697675.091357.instruction: Create src/chart.py implementing Chart control with: ChartSeries class (name, data points list, color), Chart class (chart_type: bar/line/pie, series list, title, x_label, y_label, show_legend flag). Include methods: add_series(), remove_series(), clear_data(), set_chart_type(), render method drawing charts using ASCII/Unicode characters. Support auto-scaling of axes. Include events: on_point_click, on_series_click.

1783697678.2846873.instruction: Create src/database.py implementing SQLite database connectivity with: Database class (connection handle, database path), QueryResult class (rows list, column names, row count, column count). Include methods: connect(), disconnect(), execute_query(), execute_non_query(), get_tables(), get_columns(table_name), begin_transaction(), commit(), rollback(). Support parameterized queries for security. Include events: on_query_complete, on_error.

1783697681.192891.instruction: Create src/network.py implementing HTTP operations with: HttpRequest class (method, url, headers dict, body, timeout), HttpResponse class (status_code, headers dict, body, json parsed data). Include methods: get(), post(), put(), delete(), download_file(), upload_file(). Support JSON parsing automatically. Include events: on_request_complete, on_request_error, on_download_progress. Handle timeouts and connection errors gracefully.

1783697684.250147.instruction: Create src/custom_dialog.py implementing CustomDialog with: dialog_template (form definition similar to main form), modal flag, result_value. Include methods: show_dialog(), close_dialog(), get_result(), set_result(). Support custom layouts with any controls. Dialog can return values via result property. Include events: on_dialog_open, on_dialog_close, on_dialog_result. Support centering on parent form.

1783697687.494487.instruction: Create src/regex.py implementing regex operations with: Regex class (pattern, flags), Match class (value, position, groups dict). Include methods: search(text), match(text), find_all(text), replace(text, replacement), split(text). Support common flags: case_insensitive, multiline, dotall. Include utility functions: is_valid_pattern(), escape_string(). Return match objects with group extraction support.

1783697691.7431955.instruction: Create examples/database_browser_v22.json demonstrating: SQLite database connection using database module, query execution with results displayed in Grid control, table browser with TreeView showing database schema (tables, columns), SQL query editor with TextArea, parameterized query examples, transaction handling demonstration. Include menus for Connect, Execute Query, Refresh Schema.

1783697694.3315942.instruction: Create examples/chart_viewer.json demonstrating: Chart control with multiple series, bar chart visualization, line chart visualization, pie chart visualization, data input via Grid or file loading, chart type switching, legend display, chart customization (colors, titles). Include sample datasets and interactive features like clicking data points.

1783697696.738476.instruction: Create examples/web_api_client.json demonstrating: HTTP GET requests to fetch data from public APIs (e.g., weather, quotes, or JSONPlaceholder), HTTP POST requests to submit data, JSON parsing and display in Grid or TextArea, request/response headers display, error handling for network issues, loading indicators using ProgressBar. Include URL input field, method selection (GET/POST), and results display area.

1783697699.7000053.instruction: Create examples/file_explorer_v22.json demonstrating: TreeView showing directory hierarchy with expand/collapse, ListView or Grid showing files in selected directory, Splitter control for resizable panels, Toolbar with common actions (New, Delete, Rename, Refresh), StatusBar showing file counts and selected item info, Drag and drop between folders. Include icons for different file types and context menu support.

1783697711.5881336.instruction: Create examples/tabbed_interface.json demonstrating: TabControl with multiple pages, different controls on each tab (form elements on one tab, data display on another, settings on third), dynamic tab addition and removal, tab switching events, saving/restoring active tab state. Include practical use case like multi-page settings dialog or document viewer with tabs.

1783697713.9403493.instruction: Create examples/color_picker_demo.json demonstrating: ColorPicker control for selecting colors, applying selected color to other controls (backgrounds, labels), palette of preset colors, custom color input via RGB values, color preview display. Include practical use cases like theme customization or drawing application color selection.

1783697716.7008336.instruction: Create examples/custom_dialog_demo.json demonstrating: CustomDialog with custom layout and controls, modal dialog with return values, input validation in dialogs, dialog opening from main form, passing data to and from dialogs. Include practical examples like settings dialog, confirmation dialogs with custom options, or data entry forms.

1783697719.464101.instruction: Create docs/API_REFERENCE_V22.md documenting all v2.2.0 additions: new controls (TreeView, TabControl, ProgressBar, Slider, Toolbar, StatusBar, Splitter, ColorPicker, Chart) with properties, methods, and events; database module API (Database, QueryResult classes, all methods); network module API (HttpRequest, HttpResponse classes, HTTP methods); regex module API (Regex, Match classes); custom dialog API. Include code examples for each feature.

1783697721.884619.instruction: Create docs/DATABASE_TUTORIAL.md step-by-step tutorial covering: connecting to SQLite database, executing queries and displaying results, using parameterized queries for security, handling transactions (begin, commit, rollback), browsing database schema with TreeView, building a simple CRUD application. Include complete working examples and common patterns.

1783697724.6273088.instruction: Create docs/CHART_CONTROL_GUIDE.md comprehensive guide for Chart control covering: creating different chart types (bar, line, pie), adding and configuring data series, customizing colors and appearance, handling chart events (point clicks), updating data dynamically, combining charts with other controls. Include practical examples and best practices for data visualization in terminal UI.

1783697726.8218915.instruction: Create docs/NETWORK_GUIDE.md guide for HTTP operations covering: making GET and POST requests, handling JSON responses, downloading files with progress indication, error handling for network issues, authentication headers, working with REST APIs. Include practical examples like weather app, news reader, or API client.

1783697729.7803545.instruction: Create docs/ADVANCED_CONTROLS_GUIDE.md covering TreeView (nodes, icons, expand/collapse), TabControl (pages, switching), Splitter (resizable panels), Toolbar (buttons, separators), StatusBar (panels). Include practical examples: file browser with TreeView, settings dialog with TabControl, resizable panels with Splitter, application with Toolbar and StatusBar.

1783697732.0522625.instruction: Create docs/PROJECT_FORMAT_V22.md updating JSON project format for v2.2.0: document new control types (17-25), new properties for existing controls, database connection settings format, network request configuration, custom dialog definitions. Include version field changes, backward compatibility notes, and migration guide from v2.1.0.

1783697735.0401726.instruction: Create docs/HISTORY_V22.md detailed release notes for v2.2.0: list all new features with descriptions, breaking changes from v2.1.0, migration guide for existing projects, known issues and limitations, credits and acknowledgments. Organize by feature category (Controls, Database, Network, Documentation).

1783697743.3018875.instruction: Update README.md to reflect v2.2.0: change version badge to 2.2.0, add "New in v2.2.0" section listing TreeView, TabControl, ProgressBar, Slider, Toolbar, StatusBar, Splitter, ColorPicker, Chart controls, Database connectivity, Network/HTTP operations, Custom Dialogs, Regex support. Update project structure section to include new src/ modules. Update control table with new controls. Update documentation links. Update examples section with v2.2.0 examples.

1783697746.554815.instruction: Update HISTORY.md adding v2.2.0 section: list major features (9 new controls, database module, network module, regex module, custom dialogs), new example projects (8 examples), new documentation files. Keep brief summary, refer to HISTORY_V22.md for details.

1783697749.0821364.instruction: Update examples/README.md adding v2.2.0 examples section: database_browser_v22, chart_viewer, web_api_client, file_explorer_v22, tabbed_interface, color_picker_demo, custom_dialog_demo. Update feature matrix to include v2.2.0 features (TreeView, TabControl, Chart, Database, Network, etc.). Update version compatibility notes.

1783697751.8250318.instruction: Create examples/V22_EXAMPLES_SUMMARY.md documenting all v2.2.0 examples: list each example with features demonstrated, code quality notes, testing checklist, feature coverage matrix showing which examples use which v2.2.0 features. Include usage instructions and links to relevant documentation.

1783697755.0085447.instruction: Update rad-tui-py.py to integrate all v2.2.0 modules: add imports for treeview, tabcontrol, progressbar, slider, toolbar, statusbar, splitter, colorpicker, chart, database, network, regex, custom_dialog. Add new control types to toolbox (17-25). Add new built-in functions to runtime namespace (database_connect, http_get, http_post, regex_search, etc.). Update control rendering to handle new controls. Add event handlers for new control events. Ensure backward compatibility with v2.1.0 projects.

1783697758.0898447.instruction: Create tests/test_v22_features.py testing suite for v2.2.0: test each new control module (TreeView, TabControl, etc.) with unit tests, test database module with in-memory SQLite, test network module with mock responses, test regex module with pattern matching, test custom dialogs. Include integration tests loading v2.2.0 example projects. Generate TEST_RESULTS_V22.md with test coverage report.
